title: ProductionCompany
description: A production company / applicant / permittee — the party that applies for and holds a NYC film permit. GAP: MOME never publishes the applicant to the Film Permits Open Data (tg4x-b46p); the production company exists only inside the login-walled 'MOME E-Apply' portal (nyceventpermits.nyc.gov/film) and, partially, on DOT's filming-permit dataset (c2az-nhru, PRIMARYCONTACT* fields). Reconstructed here as the intake identity behind a FilmPermitApplication.

companyName.description: Legal / production company name ('APPLICATIONNAME' on the DOT twin).

address.description: Mailing address of the production office.

internationalProduction.description: Whether this is an international production (MOME has a dedicated international-production track).
